items.headline: Brass Docks
items.description: Fog, labor crews, and a berth where half the rumors begin.

items.headline: Gilt Hall
items.description: A hired hall used for masked exchanges and private bids.

items.headline: Grand Archive
items.description: A powder-dry archive where ledgers go missing in plain sight.

items.headline: Skybridge Market
items.description: A noisy market where couriers, brokers, and thieves overlap.

items.headline: Sparklock Bank
items.description: A tight bank with nervous clerks, layered locks, and private notes.

items.headline: Sunspike Glassworks
items.description: A furnace district where shipments vanish into heat and reflected light.

items.headline: Cascade Shrine
items.description: A rain-streaked shrine where quiet promises are safer than loud ones.
